pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-S-002 (OP, Skill) maps to Clinical Data Manager scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.5038 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.504, eu_ai_act=0.500, dcwf=0.428. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5038 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-S-002 (OP, composite 0.5038) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5038 for OP domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.504, eu_ai_act=0.500, dcwf=0.428 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.5038 exceeds external evidence threshold for OP domain inclusion in Clinical Data Manager.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5038, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
